hooks.command: echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.setEncoding('utf8');process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const blocked=['.env','credentials','.secret'];const fp=(JSON.parse(d).file_path||'').toLowerCase();if(blocked.some(b=>fp.includes(b))){console.error('BLOCKED: Cannot edit sensitive file: '+fp);process.exit(1)}})"
